title: dryopteris filix-mas subsp. abbreviata
intro: Dryopteris filix-mas subsp. abbreviata, also known as the lily fern or dwarf lady fern, is a subspecies of fern native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is used to treat various health conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and skin problems. The health benefits of Dryopteris filix-mas subsp. abbreviata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
